title: License required
doc_html:
§1360.54.  License required

No one shall engage in the practice of medical psychology, or hold himself out as a medical psychologist in this state unless licensed in accordance with the provisions of this Part.

Acts 2009, No. 251, §11, eff. July 1, 2009.

§1360.54.  License required
